task_completion.description: The Non-Linear Animation (NLA) editor is opened in the Blender workspace.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The NLA Editor area is visible in the Blender interface, identifiable by the track list on the left and the timeline with strips on the right.

task_completion.description: The 'Dolly_Move' action is pushed down into an NLA track.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the NLA Editor, under the Camera object, there is an NLA strip named 'Dolly_Move' placed on a track.

task_completion.description: The 'Handheld_Shake' action is added as a new NLA track above the dolly move.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the NLA Editor, there is a second track above the 'Dolly_Move' track containing an NLA strip named 'Handheld_Shake'.

task_completion.description: The blend mode for the 'Handheld_Shake' strip is set to 'Add' or 'Combine'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: With the 'Handheld_Shake' strip selected, the sidebar (N-panel) in the NLA Editor under the 'Strip' tab shows the 'Blending' mode set to 'Add' or 'Combine'.

task_completion.description: The scene is saved to the specified filepath.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Blender window title bar displays 'nla_camera_composite.blend', or a save dialog/file browser shows the file saved in the '/home/ga/BlenderProjects/' directory.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Blender GUI to perform the NLA layering.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the mouse cursor interacting with the NLA editor, menus, or properties panel, rather than just terminal windows.

integrity.description: The agent used the actual Blender application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The standard Blender interface is visible with the 3D viewport, NLA editor, and properties panels.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a Python script to bypass the manual NLA setup.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Blender Text Editor or Python Console is not the primary tool used to complete the task; the NLA Editor UI is actively used.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires exactly 2 NLA tracks on the camera object. The bottom track should contain the 'Dolly_Move' action. The top track should contain the 'Handheld_Shake' action. The blend mode for the 'Handheld_Shake' strip must be set to 'ADD' or 'COMBINE' to properly layer the animation without overwriting keyframes. The final file must be saved as '/home/ga/BlenderProjects/nla_camera_composite.blend'.
